verdict: Review Questionnaire is an implementation artifact for pre-Paperwork-Needed candidates when questionnaire enrichment data is absent — not a hard business gate before paperwork send. The intended post-assignment path is Applied → Assign Recruiter → Paperwork Needed (P158.3) → Send Paperwork, which P157 already supports without requiring questionnaire answers.
confidenceRationale: P157 Send Paperwork rule (action-rules.ts:70-86) does not check questionnaireComplete — only P152 eligibility and workflow stage.
P158.3 dry-run (2026-07-07) projected 25/25 Send Paperwork after Applied→Paperwork Needed transition with no questionnaire requirement in transition-rules.ts.
P158.2 diagnosed workflow_state_issue (not missing_questionnaire) as the sole blocker for 25/25 post-assignment candidates.
P152 BYPASSED_RULES explicitly bypass legacy questionnaire/workflow gates for immediate paperwork policy.
P169/P171 classify Review Questionnaire as manual-review exception ('Unexpected classification'), not an automation happy path.
P177 measured 0/25 newest candidates with questionnaire data; missing data defaults available=false (questionnaire-parser.ts:310).

questionnaireDesignIntent.requiredForPreTransitionScreening: soft — blocks Applied-status candidates until enrichment or manual review
questionnaireDesignIntent.summary: Questionnaire was designed as OPTIONAL intelligence for grading and tech-readiness screening (P56/P86). P157 treats missing questionnaire (available=false) the same as incomplete questionnaire, routing to Review Questionnaire. Once workflow reaches Paperwork Needed, P157 Send Paperwork fires without questionnaire. Missing enrichment data therefore creates an artificial gate for Applied-status candidates.

p157NoteOnPaperworkNeeded: Paperwork Needed is a workflow status, not a P157 decision action. P157 never returns 'Paperwork Needed' as an action. Status is set by P83 advancement, P158.3 post-assignment transition, or recruiter workspace actions (e.g. schedule-interview).

transitions.businessIntent: true_business_requirement — recruiter must be assigned before downstream actions
true_business_requirement — send only when P152 passes and workflow stage permits

dataDefault.behavior: if (answers.length === 0) return unavailableQuestionnaire() with available: false

transitions.businessIntent: artificial_workflow_gate when available=false due to missing enrichment; true_business_requirement when techReady===false (failed tech screening)

transitions.conditional: row.workflowStatus in Applied|Needs Review|Qualified OR applicantVerdict needs-review|incomplete (after questionnaire rule does not match)

setBy.conditional: P158.3 transition eligibility passes (P152 hard blockers only — no questionnaire check)
P83 shouldAdvance when confidence/approval gates pass

Review Questionnaire.p1582FixHint: src/lib/p158-post-assignment-outcome-diagnosis/recommend-fix.ts:6-7 — missing_questionnaire fix suggests questionnaire request path

Paperwork Needed.p152Bypassed: src/lib/p152-immediate-paperwork-policy/detect-legacy-paperwork-blockers.ts:23 — legacy rule bypassed for immediate policy

questionnaireIntelligence.uiPanel: src/components/recruiting/candidate-workspace/candidate-questionnaire-intelligence-panel.tsx — shows 'Not available from Breezy yet.' when !available

questionnaireRequired.fastTrackOptional: src/lib/autonomous-hiring-decision-engine/build-hiring-decision.ts:230 — rules.fastTrack.requireQuestionnaire is configurable, default path holds on missing questionnaire for fast_track only

recruiterUI.p157Panel: src/components/executive/recruiting-decisions-panel.tsx — displays P157 action per candidate; no hardcoded Applied→Review Questionnaire→Paperwork sequence
recruiterUI.candidateWorkspace: src/lib/candidate-workspace/resolve-workspace-action.ts — Applied shows 'Contact candidate'; no Review Questionnaire step
recruiterUI.questionnairePanel: Displays intelligence when available; gracefully handles missing data — does not block UI actions on questionnaire

documentedIntendedFlow.withQuestionnaireEnrichment: Applied → Assign Recruiter → (optional Review Questionnaire if tech fails) → Paperwork Needed → Send Paperwork
documentedIntendedFlow.postAssignmentAutomation: Applied → Assign Recruiter → Paperwork Needed (P158.3) → Send Paperwork — documented in P158.2/P158.3 artifacts
documentedIntendedFlow.explicitWithoutQuestionnaireStep: P158.2 safest change and P158.3 dry-run omit Review Questionnaire; transition-rules.ts has no questionnaire gate

uiAndDocumentationExpectations.whichFlowIsCanonical: Applied → Assign Recruiter → Paperwork Needed → Send Paperwork (P158.2/P158.3). Review Questionnaire is a holding action for Applied candidates lacking enrichment, not a documented mandatory funnel step.

workflowDiagram:
flowchart TD
  A[Applied] --> B{Recruiter assigned?}
  B -->|No| AR[Assign Recruiter]
  B -->|Yes| C{workflowStatus Paperwork Needed?}
  C -->|Yes + P152 pass| SP[Send Paperwork]
  C -->|No| D{questionnaireIntelligence.available?}
  D -->|No default| RQ[Review Questionnaire]
  D -->|Yes + techReady false| RQ
  D -->|Yes + techReady ok| MR[Manual Review / other rules]
  AR --> P158{P158.3 transition}
  P158 --> PN[Paperwork Needed status]
  PN --> SP
  RQ -.->|does NOT advance status| A
  style RQ fill:#f9f,stroke:#333
  style PN fill:#9f9,stroke:#333
  style SP fill:#9f9,stroke:#333

contradictions.detail: diagnose-blocker.ts:131 flags missing_questionnaire, but transition-rules.ts does not check questionnaire — P158.3 bypasses questionnaire entirely

contradictions.area: P157 Send Paperwork vs Review Questionnaire
contradictions.detail: Send Paperwork (rule 6) does not require questionnaire; Review Questionnaire (rule 10) blocks Applied candidates before they can reach Paperwork Needed without P158.3
p177-questionnaire-gate-diagnosis.json incorrectly listed questionnaireComplete as Send Paperwork requirement — corrected in P177.1: questionnaire gates Review Questionnaire only, not Send Paperwork

behaviorRestorationExplanation: Changing Review Questionnaire to treat missing enrichment as non-blocking (or running existing P158.3 transition) restores the flow already validated in P158.3 dry-run and recommended in P158.2. It does not bypass P152 duplicate/email/signature checks. Tech-readiness failures (techReady===false) should remain blocking.

recommendation.primary: Do not weaken P157 Send Paperwork. Run P158.3 post-assignment workflow transition (already implemented) to advance P152-eligible assigned candidates from Applied to Paperwork Needed, then re-evaluate P157 — matches P158.2/P158.3 evidence.
recommendation.secondary: If P157 Review Questionnaire must change: only demote missing-data case — change conditional from `!questionnaireComplete` to `questionnaireTechReady === false` (treat unavailable as non-blocking, failed tech as blocking).
recommendation.doNot: Do not remove P152 hard blockers or send paperwork in this phase.
recommendation.classification: artificial_workflow_gate for missing data; true_business_requirement for techReady===false

optionA.description: Enable/run existing P158.3 transition after recruiter assignment (no P157 change)
optionA.changeSize: 0 lines — orchestration only; feature already built
optionA.expectedEffect: 21 P152-eligible newest-25 candidates → Paperwork Needed → Send Paperwork per P177 simulation (minus 4 true blockers)

optionB.description: Narrow Review Questionnaire gate in P157 action-rules.ts
optionB.expectedEffect: Applied candidates with missing questionnaire fall through to Manual Review or other rules instead of Review Questionnaire; still need P158.3 for Send Paperwork

p157OriginalCohort.note: Send Paperwork candidates already at Paperwork Needed; Review Questionnaire correlated with missing questionnaire enrichment

p1583DryRun.note: No questionnaire check in transition; all became Send Paperwork after Paperwork Needed

p177.note: Questionnaire bypass alone insufficient — workflow stage gate also required

safetyConfirmation: Read-only investigation — no code, Breezy, Dropbox, or automation changes
P152 remains send safety layer regardless of questionnaire gate change
P158.3 is workflow overlay only — does not send paperwork
Duplicates (3) and unassigned (1) remain manual per P177
